ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the size standard (e.g., FR, UK, EUR) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country for the size standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the size standard */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of standard (e.g., Men, Women, Kids) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Measurement for bust */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Measurement for waist */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Measurement for hips */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Measurement for shoulder width */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Measurement for sleeve length */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Measurement for inseam length */,
  "fr" TEXT /* Size according to the French standard */,
  "uk" TEXT /* Size according to the UK standard */,
  "eur" TEXT /* Size according to the European standard */,
  "it" TEXT /* Size according to the Italian standard */,
  "de" TEXT /* Size according to the German standard */,
  "usa" TEXT /* Size according to the US standard */,
  "aus" TEXT /* Size according to the Australian standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_eur FOREIGN KEY ("eur") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_fr FOREIGN KEY ("fr") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_it FOREIGN KEY ("it") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_de FOREIGN KEY ("de") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_usa FOREIGN KEY ("usa") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_uk FOREIGN KEY ("uk") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_aus FOREIGN KEY ("aus") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the measurements belong to */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Measurement for bust */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Measurement for waist */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Measurement for hips */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Measurement for shoulder width */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Measurement for sleeve length */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Measurement for inseam length */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart entry */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which the inventory should be reordered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the style (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the style is designed */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the style is designed (e.g., Adult, Kids) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the style was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style purchased */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart entry for the purchased item */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items purchased */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the purchase was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase associated with the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was returned */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "return_method" TEXT /* Method of return (e.g., In-store, Mail) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the return was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style for which the recommendation is made */,
  "recommended_size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size chart entry */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for the recommendation */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the recommendation was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation the feedback is for */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the recommendation (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES size_recommendations ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion rule */,
  "from_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard to convert from */,
  "to_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard to convert to */,
  "conversion_formula" TEXT /* Formula or rule to convert sizes between the two standards */,
  "last_validated" TEXT /* Date when the conversion rule was last validated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the conversion rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_from_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_to_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id")
)
